brief: Implement research-000129: staged filter + Apply, Tipos routing fix, date presets, table sort/full-text, map filter-this-area
filter assistant NL->query params, unified query API, saved filters

research_decisions.decision: Additive POST /reports/query: multi-value filters + bbox + date range + semantic ranker + pagination; deprecate /geojson+/search after SPA migrates
SQL is filter source of truth, Chroma ranker-only; filter-then-rank-in-memory, rank whole filtered set before paginating; max_results cap
Ollama format JSON-schema + Pydantic validate + repair; populates editable draft only, never auto-apply; the transparency safeguard
Role scoping on unified query + per-user ownership on saved filters (BOLA prevention) via dependencies.py
Versioned per-user JSON blob, validate-on-load, drop drifted fields; user_id FK + index

brief: Unified reports query API Phase B + frontend retarget; NL assistant + saved filters deferred

research_decisions.decision: Complement, do not replace plan-132; analytics is a separate capability, not the filtering endpoint
Reject raw NL->SQL direct execution: PII/credential exposure, S3/T5 violation, silent-wrong on qwen3:8b
If analytics built, use a constrained query IR (LLM emits validated JSON, backend compiles to SQLAlchemy) not raw guarded SQL
Scope analytics to agent/admin only over a PII-stripped view to make row-level security trivial
Render generated SQL/IR and require explicit Run gesture; never a silent wrong answer
If raw SQL used: read-only PRAGMA, PII-stripped view, role gate, sqlglot AST allowlist, forced LIMIT+timeout, repair retry

If raw SQL used: read-only PRAGMA, PII-stripped view, role gate, sqlglot AST allowlist, forced LIMIT+timeout, repair retry

research_decisions.decision: Four-section rail at w-72 with collapse toggle: preset bar, active chips, draft controls, NL assistant footer
POST /nl/filter with Ollama JSON-schema format, Pydantic validate, one repair retry, 503 fallback, 8s timeout
WHERE owner_id=current_user.id in every SQL query; return 404 not 403 on non-owned resource
IFilterParser ABC in domain/repositories/; OllamaFilterParser in infrastructure/ollama/
Client-side sort, Radix Dialog full-text, pagination from API total, score column on ranked_by=similarity
